title: Bat Removal & Exclusion in North Merrick, NY | $900-$2,500
metaDescription: Professional bat removal and exclusion services in North Merrick, Long Island. Safe, humane bat control for homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call today for a free estimate!
intro: North Merrick homeowners facing bat infestations need professional, humane removal services that comply with New York wildlife regulations. Best Pest Control NYC specializes in complete bat exclusion solutions for North Merrick properties, ensuring these protected mammals are safely removed and prevented from returning. Our experienced technicians understand the unique challenges of bat control in Long Island's residential communities.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of wildlife control experience to North Merrick, combining humane bat removal techniques with comprehensive exclusion methods that guarantee long-term results. Our licensed professionals use state-of-the-art equipment and follow all New York State DEC guidelines, providing North Merrick residents with safe, effective, and legally compliant bat control services.
localContext: North Merrick's mix of mid-century ranch homes and Cape Cod-style houses, particularly in neighborhoods near Merrick Avenue and Jerusalem Avenue, often feature attic spaces and eaves that attract roosting bats. The tree-lined streets and proximity to conservation areas make this community especially susceptible to bat activity during spring and summer months.

faqs.question: How much does bat removal cost in North Merrick?
faqs.answer: Bat removal and exclusion services in North Merrick typically range from $900 to $2,500, depending on the size of the colony, number of entry points, and extent of exclusion work needed. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning any work, with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: Is it legal to remove bats in North Merrick, NY?
faqs.answer: Yes, but bat removal in New York must follow strict guidelines. Bats are protected species and can only be excluded during specific times of year (typically mid-August through mid-April) to avoid separating mothers from flightless young. Our technicians are fully licensed and ensure all work complies with New York State Department of Environmental Conservation regulations.

faqs.question: What does bat exclusion involve for North Merrick homes?
faqs.answer: Our bat exclusion process includes a thorough inspection to identify all entry points, installation of one-way exclusion devices that allow bats to leave but not return, sealing of all potential entry points with durable materials, attic sanitization if needed, and a warranty to guarantee bats won't return. The process typically takes 3-7 days for bats to fully vacate.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have bats in my North Merrick home?
faqs.answer: Common signs of bat infestation include squeaking or scratching sounds in walls or attic at dusk or dawn, visible droppings (guano) that resemble mouse droppings but crumble to dust, brown staining around entry points, and seeing bats entering or exiting your home at twilight. If you notice any of these signs, contact us immediately for a professional inspection.
